issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases for TensorFlow operations.
The skill file assumes specific GPU setups (CUDA, cuDNN, Apple Silicon) which may not be available on all platforms.

scenarios.name: Keras classifier with early stopping, LR plateau, and best checkpoint
scenarios.rationale: Baseline hand-rolls a per-epoch loop and lacks the three documented callbacks; treatment passes EarlyStopping, ReduceLROnPlateau, and ModelCheckpoint into model.fit.

scenarios.name: TFLite conversion with quantization for mobile
scenarios.rationale: Baseline converts but omits converter.optimizations; treatment sets [tf.lite.Optimize.DEFAULT] and writes the .tflite bytes as documented.
